data.body:
## Description

Edit `plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md`:

### 1. Add File Impact Enumeration subsection (after Architectural Alignment in Step 1, or beginning of Step 3)
- Instructions to enumerate all files affected by the story using Glob/Grep
- For each source file, find associated tests via: `source plugins/dso/hooks/lib/fuzzy-match.sh && fuzzy_find_associated_tests <src_file> <repo_root>` or by reading .test-index entries
- Build file-impact-with-tests table: source file → change action (create/modify/remove) → associated tests → test classification (needs-modification/needs-removal/still-valid)

### 2. Update TDD Task Structure in Step 3
- Add "Modify existing test" task type: when source behavior changes, the RED test modifies an existing test to assert the new expected behavior
- Add "Remove test" task type: when source behavior is deleted, remove tests that verify the deleted behavior (or remove relevant test cases within a test file)
- Reinforce: "A RED test may be modifying an existing test to assert new expected behavior, not only writing a brand-new test file. Tests are behavioral specifications — when behavior changes, the specification must be updated."
- Classification guide linking file-impact table to task types: (a) behavior changed → modify-test task, (b) behavior deleted → remove-test task, (c) behavior added → create-test task (existing flow)

TDD: Task aac3-f70e RED tests go GREEN.

### File Impact
- Edit: `plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md`
- Edit: `.test-index` (remove RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Contains file impact enumeration step
  Verify: grep -qi "file impact enumeration\|enumerate.*affected.*files.*test" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] References fuzzy_find_associated_tests
  Verify: grep -q "fuzzy_find_associated_tests" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] Defines modify-existing-test task type
  Verify: grep -qi "modify.*existing.*test.*task\|update.*existing.*test.*task" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] Defines remove-test task type
  Verify: grep -qi "remove.*test.*task\|remove.*test.*type" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] Contains behavioral specification reinforcement
  Verify: grep -qi "tests are behavioral specifications\|RED test may.*modify.*existing" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] Contains file-impact-with-tests table structure
  Verify: grep -qi "change action.*associated tests\|source.*action.*test.*classification\|needs-modification\|needs-removal\|still-valid" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] RED marker removed and entry preserved
  Verify: grep -q 'SKILL.md.*test_implementation_plan_skill_tdd_enforcement.py' .test-index && ! grep -q 'SKILL.md.*test_implementation_plan_skill_tdd_enforcement.py.*\[' .test-index
